summary: Smoke test of Du' Spicci backend and frontend. All backend endpoints (auth + jobs) and the headline magic auto-switch flow on the frontend work end-to-end.
passed: POST /api/auth/login with test@duspicci.it / test1234 returns access_token + user
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer returns the user
POST /api/jobs with auth returns full JobOut (owner_name='Tester')
After POST, GET /api/jobs returns the new ad at index 0 (sorted DESC by created_at)
Frontend: Auth page renders Login/Register tabs; login flow lands on board-page
Frontend: Board renders job cards with apply-button and job-card-price
Frontend: toggle-offro reveals offer-job-form; submit publishes and AUTO-SWITCHES back to Cerco with the new ad at position 0 and ring/highlight class applied
Frontend: logout-button clears session and returns to auth page
notes: Test user already existed from prior curl; used login instead of register. Mobile viewport (390x844) used. New ad title verified at top card after Offro submit; ring/highlight class detected on first card confirming the 'magic' UX.
